text:
It was a sunny day. Daisy was walking her little rabbitabbit Grim. Grim loved to nibble flowers. Daisy loved talking trees. They came upon a tall oaksome.

"What delightful things do you love?"

"Oh dear," said an old owl. You do know you live here?




"Oh dear," sighed Owl.



"I love just sitting under old branches..."

"...Oh I love you!"

They soared off together.




There was an old owl who loved an old oak.




A fox swooped down.




The old owl didn’t flinch.



"What do you have?"

"A carrot."

"Hmm... how do you get such big carrots?"

"You chew them"

"I mean... how?"

"Oh... you chew them."

They laughed.




And they fell asleep.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
